title: Vincetoxicum belostemma
taxonomy: Vincetoxicum belostemma is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This species is part of the genus Vincetoxicum, which is a group of plants commonly known as the dog's-tooth violets. The genus Vincetoxicum is within the subfamily Asclepiadoideae, which is a large group of plants known as the milkweeds and dogbanes. The classification of Vincetoxicum belostemma reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Apocynaceae family. This plant's classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
